summary: Template System testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All template features working - category management, publishing, gallery, preview, filtering. No critical issues found.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - minor accessibility issue

passed_tests: Admin Panel loads with Categories tab ✓
Existing 'Project Management' category displayed ✓
Create Category dialog opens with Name and Description inputs ✓
Category creation with 'Software Development' successful ✓
Template Gallery page loads with search and filter ✓
Sprint Planning Template displayed with correct stats (3 lists, 5 cards) ✓
Category filter dropdown shows all categories ✓
Filtering by 'Software Development' shows empty state ✓
Filtering by 'Project Management' shows Sprint Planning Template ✓
Clicking template card opens preview modal ✓
Preview modal shows lists with sample cards ✓
'Use This Template' button visible in preview ✓
Board Page shows 'Publish' button for admin/owner ✓
Publish dialog shows Template Name, Description, Category dropdown ✓
Publishing template with 'Dev Team Kanban Template' successful ✓
New template appears in Templates Gallery with correct category ✓
Backend: GET /api/template-categories returns list ✓
Backend: POST /api/template-categories creates category (admin only) ✓
Backend: DELETE /api/template-categories removes category ✓
Backend: GET /api/templates returns template list with stats ✓
Backend: GET /api/templates?category_id filters correctly ✓
Backend: GET /api/templates/{id} returns full template with lists/cards ✓
Backend: POST /api/boards/{id}/publish-template works for privileged users ✓
Backend: POST /api/templates/{id}/use creates board from template ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Template publishing correctly copies all lists and cards from source board
Templates are public (no auth required to view gallery) but using requires login
Category CRUD properly restricted to admin users only
Publish button correctly shows only for privileged/admin users who own the board
Template preview correctly loads with lists/cards structure for preview
Usage count tracking implemented via 'created_from_template' field
seed_data_creation: 'Software Development' category and 'Dev Team Kanban Template' created during testing. TEST_ prefixed data cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template system fully tested. Categories: 'Project Management', 'Software Development'. Templates: 'Sprint Planning Template' (Project Management), 'Dev Team Kanban Template' (Software Development), 'TEST_Published_Template'. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_template_system.py. All CRUD operations verified for categories and templates.

admin_category_management.details: Admin can create/delete template categories via Admin Panel > Categories tab

publish_button_visibility.details: Publish button shows only for admin/privileged users who own the board

publish_dialog.details: Dialog shows Template Name (pre-filled), Description (optional), Category dropdown

template_gallery.details: Gallery shows template cards with stats (lists, cards count), creator info, category badge

template_preview.details: Clicking template opens modal with list/card structure preview

category_filter.details: Dropdown filter works, shows empty state for categories with no templates

use_template_button.details: 'Use This Template' button in preview modal navigates to workspace selection
